title: angelonia chiquitensis
intro: Angelonia chiquitensis, also known as the 'Angel Wing', is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Angelonia chiquitensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
